Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers occurrences in the entire event log
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are preceded by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that eventually lead to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers followed by SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants that end with SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are repeated more than three times within the same case
Metric: the average of the function base > 3 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers followed by SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are part of variants with performance duration above the median
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all cases

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in relation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers among all activities in the SW (Special Workflow) track
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers done after SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Average number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers per case
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Ratio of SW-AE Assign Reviewers over SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Occasions how often the SW-AE Assign Reviewers is performed consecutively without an intervening reviewer response
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are not eventually followed by any positive reviewer outcome (i.e., no SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs afterward)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all cases where 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not happen

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in cases that include at least one Assign a Different Editor activity
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'Assign a Different Editor' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers followed by another SW-AE Assign Reviewers within 24 hours
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers out of all reviewer assignment-related activities (e.g., compared to RW-AE Assign Reviewers and RSW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'RW-AE Assign Reviewers' or activity == 'RSW-AE Assign Reviewers'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that occur after a Reviewer Invitation Reminder
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' or activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'"}"

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers grouped by case:concept:name
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers made per month during the review process
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'group_by': 'month'}"

Name: Number of times SW-AE Assign Reviewers is performed before any reviewer response (i.e., before SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity != 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity != 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity != 'SW-Reviewer No Response'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that occur in variants leading to a revision decision (SW-EIC Major Revision or SW-EIC Minor Revision)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Major Revision' or activity == 'SW-EIC Minor Revision'"}"

Name: Fraction of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are dismissed by subsequent Unassign Reviewer or Unassign Editor actions
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'Unassign Reviewer' or activity == 'Unassign Editor'"}"
